name: Chocolate Cake Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature (70 degrees F).
2. Beat the sugar and eggs together until creamy and lemon-colored.
3. Melt the butter and chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat.
4. Combine with the sugar and egg mixture.
5. Add vanilla and buttermilk, stirring into the sugar mixture.
6. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
7. Stir this dry mixture into the liquid mixture.
8. Chill dough slightly to make it easier to handle.
9. Roll out half the dough on a lightly floured board to 1/2 inch thickness.
10. Cut into doughnuts.
11. Allow cut doughnuts to dry for 10 minutes.
12. Heat oil to 370 degrees in a large skillet. Ensure dough is at room temperature before frying.
13. Dip metal pancake turner into hot oil each time before use.
14. Fry doughnuts, one every 15 seconds, until golden and cooked through (about 90 seconds per side).
15. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
16. Prepare icing by beating sugar, egg white, and vanilla until smooth.
17. Drizzle over cooled doughnuts.
Yields: 30 Doughnuts
